nasb.text: Gideon sent messengers throughout all the hill country of Ephraim, saying, “Come down against Midian and take the waters before them, as far as Beth-barah and the Jordan.” So all the men of Ephraim were summoned and they took the waters as far as Beth-barah and the Jordan.

esv.text: Gideon sent messengers throughout all the hill country of Ephraim, saying, “Come down against the Midianites and capture the waters against them, as far as Beth-barah, and also the Jordan.” So all the men of Ephraim were called out, and they captured the waters as far as Beth-barah, and also the Jordan.

cnv.text: 基甸派遣了使者走遍以法蓮山地，說：“你們要下來迎戰米甸人，在他們前面把守約旦河的渡口，直到伯．巴拉。”於是以法蓮的人都被召來，把守約旦河的渡口，直到伯．巴拉。

ccb.text: 又派人到整个以法莲山区，吩咐当地人攻打米甸人，占据远至伯·巴拉一带的约旦河渡口。以法莲人都依言而行，
